character_backstory: His family was killed, he was given a terrible monster implanted inside him whose anger would spill out and cause him to rampage through his city.
character_evolution: He learned to control this monster which let him become the best ninja in the world and by the end he became Hokage of his village and helped all other people who were like him overcome their inner monsters.
ideal_home: My ideal house is in the forest by a lake with a giant windowed facade overlooking a board-walk to the lake. there is a steinway grand piano in the room with the window and to the right of this room is an open kitchen. behind this room is the stairs up to the bedrooms. this room is somewhat like a living room. i know theres books somewhere but thats all. theres no one else in this house it is peaceful and i am playing piano.
background: my mom was crazy and loud and always mad at me for something or other, my dad was not present.
current_challenges: anger management, fear of not being enough
ten_year_outlook: Millionaire from my own doing. Medical physicist well known researcher, bodybuilder and calisthenics athlete as well as published author of philosophy books and physics papers. I will have a PhD and maybe even write psychology papers.
